title: The Reason for [Zayd b. 'All's] Death, an Account of His Circumstances, and the Cause of His Rebellion
description: The Reason for [Zayd b. 'All's] Death, an Account of His Circumstances, and the Cause of His Rebellion. Recorded under the year 120 AH (738–739 CE) in al-Tabari's History, volume 26.

sources.citation: al-Tabari, The History of al-Tabari (SUNY), vol. 26
